question: What is the total revenue for Q4 2024?
sql: SELECT SUM(revenue) FROM sales WHERE quarter = 'Q4' AND year = 2024;
creator: John Smith

question: How many active users do we have this month?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_activity WHERE activity_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE);
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: What are the top 5 products by sales volume?
sql: SELECT product_name, SUM(quantity) as total_sales FROM orders GROUP BY product_name ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 5;
creator: Michael Chen

question: What is the average customer lifetime value?
sql: SELECT AVG(total_revenue) FROM (SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) as total_revenue FROM transactions GROUP BY customer_id) as customer_revenue;
creator: Emily Davis

question: Which region has the highest conversion rate?
sql: SELECT region, COUNT(CASE WHEN converted = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as conversion_rate FROM leads GROUP BY region ORDER BY conversion_rate DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: David Wilson

question: How many orders were placed in the last 7 days?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days';
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: What is the inventory level for product SKU-12345?
sql: SELECT quantity FROM inventory WHERE sku = 'SKU-12345';
creator: Robert Taylor

question: Which customer segment has the highest retention rate?
sql: SELECT segment, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM customers WHERE segment = c.segment) as retention_rate FROM customer_segments c GROUP BY segment ORDER BY retention_rate DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: What is the total number of support tickets opened this week?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets WHERE created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE);
creator: John Smith

question: What are the monthly recurring revenue trends for the last 6 months?
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', subscription_date) as month, SUM(monthly_fee) as mrr FROM subscriptions WHERE subscription_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: What is the revenue growth rate compared to last quarter?
sql: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 'Q4' THEN revenue END) - SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 'Q3' THEN revenue END)) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 'Q3' THEN revenue END) as growth_rate FROM sales WHERE year = 2024;
creator: Michael Chen

question: Which sales representative has the highest sales this month?
sql: SELECT sales_rep_id, SUM(amount) as total_sales FROM sales WHERE sale_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY sales_rep_id ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: Emily Davis

question: What is the average session duration for users?
sql: SELECT AVG(session_duration) FROM user_sessions WHERE session_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days';
creator: David Wilson

question: How many new users signed up in the last week?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days';
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: What is the daily active user count?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_activity WHERE activity_date = CURRENT_DATE;
creator: Robert Taylor

question: Which product category has the highest profit margin?
sql: SELECT category, AVG((price - cost) / price * 100) as profit_margin FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY profit_margin DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: What are the best-selling products by revenue?
sql: SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity * price) as total_revenue FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10;
creator: John Smith

question: How many products are currently out of stock?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE stock_quantity = 0;
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: What is the customer churn rate for this month?
sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN churned = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as churn_rate FROM customers WHERE churn_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE);
creator: Michael Chen

question: Which customers have made purchases exceeding $10,000?
sql: SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) as total_spent FROM transactions GROUP BY customer_id HAVING SUM(amount) > 10000 ORDER BY total_spent DESC;
creator: Emily Davis

question: What is the average order value by customer segment?
sql: SELECT segment, AVG(order_value) as avg_order_value FROM customer_orders GROUP BY segment ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC;
creator: David Wilson

question: Which marketing campaign has the highest ROI?
sql: SELECT campaign_id, (SUM(revenue) - SUM(cost)) * 100.0 / SUM(cost) as roi FROM marketing_campaigns GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY roi DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: How many leads were generated from email campaigns this month?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE source = 'email' AND created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE);
creator: Robert Taylor

question: What is the cost per acquisition by channel?
sql: SELECT channel, SUM(cost) / COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as cpa FROM marketing_spend GROUP BY channel ORDER BY cpa;
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: How many orders are pending fulfillment?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending' AND fulfillment_date IS NULL;
creator: John Smith

question: What is the average shipping time for orders?
sql: SELECT AVG(shipped_date - order_date) as avg_shipping_days FROM orders WHERE shipped_date IS NOT NULL;
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: Which warehouse has the lowest inventory turnover?
sql: SELECT warehouse_id, AVG(days_in_stock) as avg_days FROM inventory_movements GROUP BY warehouse_id ORDER BY avg_days DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: Michael Chen

question: What products need to be reordered based on reorder point?
sql: SELECT product_id, current_stock, reorder_point FROM inventory WHERE current_stock <= reorder_point;
creator: Emily Davis

question: How many units were sold vs returned this month?
sql: SELECT SUM(sold_quantity) as sold, SUM(returned_quantity) as returned FROM inventory_transactions WHERE transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE);
creator: David Wilson

question: What is the customer retention rate by acquisition channel?
sql: SELECT acquisition_channel, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN retained = true THEN customer_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as retention_rate FROM customers GROUP BY acquisition_channel;
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: Which customer segments have the highest average order frequency?
sql: SELECT segment, AVG(order_count) as avg_orders FROM customer_segments GROUP BY segment ORDER BY avg_orders DESC;
creator: Robert Taylor

question: What is the average response time for support tickets?
sql: SELECT AVG(first_response_time) as avg_response_minutes FROM support_tickets WHERE first_response_time IS NOT NULL;
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: How many tickets were resolved on the first contact?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets WHERE resolved_at = first_contact_at AND status = 'resolved';
creator: John Smith

question: What is the customer satisfaction score for support interactions?
sql: SELECT AVG(satisfaction_score) as avg_satisfaction FROM support_tickets WHERE satisfaction_score IS NOT NULL;
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: What is the current cash flow for this quarter?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'income' THEN amount ELSE -amount END) as cash_flow FROM financial_transactions WHERE transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE);
creator: Michael Chen

question: What are the operating expenses by category?
sql: SELECT category, SUM(amount) as total_expenses FROM expenses WHERE expense_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_expenses DESC;
creator: Emily Davis

question: What is the year-over-year revenue growth?
sql: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN year = 2024 THEN revenue END) - SUM(CASE WHEN year = 2023 THEN revenue END)) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN year = 2023 THEN revenue END) as yoy_growth FROM annual_revenue;
creator: David Wilson

question: What is the total sales by region for this quarter?
sql: SELECT region, SUM(amount) as total_sales FROM sales WHERE sale_date >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: Which product has the highest return rate?
sql: SELECT product_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN returned = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as return_rate FROM sales GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY return_rate DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: Robert Taylor

question: What is the average deal size by sales team?
sql: SELECT team_name, AVG(deal_value) as avg_deal_size FROM sales_deals GROUP BY team_name ORDER BY avg_deal_size DESC;
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: How many users completed onboarding in the last 30 days?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE onboarding_completed = true AND onboarding_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days';
creator: John Smith

question: What is the user retention rate after 30 days?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN last_active >= signup_date + INTERVAL '30 days' THEN user_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as retention_rate FROM users WHERE signup_date <= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days';
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: Which features are used most frequently?
sql: SELECT feature_name, COUNT(*) as usage_count FROM feature_usage WHERE usage_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY feature_name ORDER BY usage_count DESC LIMIT 10;
creator: Michael Chen

question: What is the product return rate by category?
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(CASE WHEN returned = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as return_rate FROM product_orders GROUP BY category ORDER BY return_rate DESC;
creator: Emily Davis

question: Which products have the highest customer ratings?
sql: SELECT product_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM product_reviews GROUP BY product_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 10;
creator: David Wilson

question: What is the inventory value by warehouse?
sql: SELECT warehouse_id, SUM(quantity * unit_cost) as total_value FROM inventory GROUP BY warehouse_id ORDER BY total_value DESC;
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: How many customers are in each loyalty tier?
sql: SELECT loyalty_tier, COUNT(*) as customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY loyalty_tier ORDER BY customer_count DESC;
creator: Robert Taylor

question: What is the average time between customer purchases?
sql: SELECT AVG(days_between_purchases) as avg_days FROM (SELECT customer_id, purchase_date - LAG(purchase_date) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY purchase_date) as days_between_purchases FROM purchases) WHERE days_between_purchases IS NOT NULL;
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: Which customers have the highest lifetime value?
sql: SELECT customer_id, SUM(total_spent) as lifetime_value FROM customer_transactions GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 20;
creator: John Smith

question: What is the click-through rate for email campaigns?
sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN clicked = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as ctr FROM email_campaigns GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY ctr DESC;
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: Which social media channel generates the most leads?
sql: SELECT channel, COUNT(*) as lead_count FROM leads WHERE source LIKE '%social%' GROUP BY channel ORDER BY lead_count DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: Michael Chen

question: What is the conversion rate from lead to customer?
sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN converted = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as conversion_rate FROM leads WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days';
creator: Emily Davis

question: How many orders were shipped yesterday?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE shipped_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day';
creator: David Wilson

question: What is the order cancellation rate?
sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as cancellation_rate FROM orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days';
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: Which shipping method is used most frequently?
sql: SELECT shipping_method, COUNT(*) as usage_count FROM orders GROUP BY shipping_method ORDER BY usage_count DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: Robert Taylor

question: What is the inventory turnover rate by product category?
sql: SELECT category, SUM(sold_quantity) / AVG(stock_quantity) as turnover_rate FROM inventory_movements GROUP BY category ORDER BY turnover_rate DESC;
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: How many products are below minimum stock level?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory WHERE current_stock < minimum_stock_level;
creator: John Smith

question: What is the average inventory value?
sql: SELECT AVG(quantity * unit_cost) as avg_inventory_value FROM inventory;
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: Which customer segments have the highest average purchase frequency?
sql: SELECT segment, AVG(purchase_count) as avg_frequency FROM customer_segments GROUP BY segment ORDER BY avg_frequency DESC;
creator: Michael Chen

question: What is the customer lifetime value by segment?
sql: SELECT segment, AVG(lifetime_value) as avg_ltv FROM customer_segments GROUP BY segment ORDER BY avg_ltv DESC;
creator: Emily Davis

question: How many customers are in the premium segment?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE segment = 'premium';
creator: David Wilson

question: What is the average resolution time for support tickets by priority?
sql: SELECT priority, AVG(resolved_at - created_at) as avg_resolution_time FROM support_tickets WHERE status = 'resolved' GROUP BY priority ORDER BY avg_resolution_time;
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: How many tickets are currently open?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets WHERE status = 'open';
creator: Robert Taylor

question: Which support agent has resolved the most tickets?
sql: SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) as resolved_count FROM support_tickets WHERE status = 'resolved' GROUP BY agent_id ORDER BY resolved_count DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: What is the profit margin by product line?
sql: SELECT product_line, AVG((selling_price - cost) / selling_price * 100) as profit_margin FROM products GROUP BY product_line ORDER BY profit_margin DESC;
creator: John Smith

question: What are the total assets vs liabilities?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'asset' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as total_assets, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'liability' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as total_liabilities FROM balance_sheet WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM balance_sheet);
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: What is the burn rate for this month?
sql: SELECT SUM(amount) as monthly_burn FROM expenses WHERE expense_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND category = 'operating';
creator: Michael Chen

question: What is the sales pipeline value?
sql: SELECT SUM(deal_value) as pipeline_value FROM sales_deals WHERE status IN ('prospecting', 'qualification', 'proposal');
creator: Emily Davis

question: Which sales stage has the longest average duration?
sql: SELECT stage, AVG(stage_duration) as avg_duration FROM sales_deals GROUP BY stage ORDER BY avg_duration DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: David Wilson

question: What is the win rate for sales deals?
sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'won' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as win_rate FROM sales_deals WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days';
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: How many users are currently active in the app?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_sessions WHERE session_end IS NULL AND session_start >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '15 minutes';
creator: Robert Taylor

question: What is the user activation rate?
sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN activated = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as activation_rate FROM users WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days';
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: Which device type do users prefer?
sql: SELECT device_type, COUNT(*) as usage_count FROM user_sessions GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY usage_count DESC;
creator: John Smith

question: What is the product review sentiment distribution?
sql: SELECT sentiment, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM product_reviews GROUP BY sentiment ORDER BY review_count DESC;
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: Which products have the most reviews?
sql: SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM product_reviews GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY review_count DESC LIMIT 10;
creator: Michael Chen

question: What is the average product rating by category?
sql: SELECT category, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM product_reviews pr JOIN products p ON pr.product_id = p.id GROUP BY category ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;
creator: Emily Davis

question: How many customers made repeat purchases?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM purchases GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
creator: David Wilson

question: What is the customer acquisition cost by channel?
sql: SELECT channel, SUM(acquisition_cost) / COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as cac FROM customer_acquisition GROUP BY channel ORDER BY cac;
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: Which customers have the highest number of referrals?
sql: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) as referral_count FROM referrals GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY referral_count DESC LIMIT 10;
creator: Robert Taylor

question: What is the email open rate for marketing campaigns?
sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN opened = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as open_rate FROM email_campaigns GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY open_rate DESC;
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: Which marketing channel has the best conversion rate?
sql: SELECT channel, COUNT(CASE WHEN converted = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as conversion_rate FROM marketing_leads GROUP BY channel ORDER BY conversion_rate DESC LIMIT 1;
creator: John Smith

question: What is the average lead response time?
sql: SELECT AVG(response_time) as avg_response_minutes FROM leads WHERE response_time IS NOT NULL;
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: How many orders are in transit?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'in_transit' AND shipped_date IS NOT NULL;
creator: Michael Chen

question: What is the average order processing time?
sql: SELECT AVG(processed_date - order_date) as avg_processing_days FROM orders WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL;
creator: Emily Davis

question: Which shipping carrier has the fastest delivery?
sql: SELECT carrier, AVG(delivery_date - shipped_date) as avg_delivery_days FROM orders WHERE delivery_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY carrier ORDER BY avg_delivery_days LIMIT 1;
creator: David Wilson

question: What is the stock aging analysis?
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN days_in_stock < 30 THEN '0-30 days' WHEN days_in_stock < 60 THEN '31-60 days' WHEN days_in_stock < 90 THEN '61-90 days' ELSE '90+ days' END as age_group, SUM(quantity * unit_cost) as value FROM inventory GROUP BY age_group;
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: How many products are discontinued?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE status = 'discontinued';
creator: Robert Taylor

question: What is the inventory shrinkage rate?
sql: SELECT SUM(shrinkage_amount) * 100.0 / SUM(expected_inventory) as shrinkage_rate FROM inventory_audits WHERE audit_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE);
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: What is the customer segment distribution?
sql: SELECT segment, COUNT(*) as customer_count, COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers) as percentage FROM customers GROUP BY segment ORDER BY customer_count DESC;
creator: John Smith

question: Which segments have the highest engagement score?
sql: SELECT segment, AVG(engagement_score) as avg_engagement FROM customer_segments GROUP BY segment ORDER BY avg_engagement DESC;
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: What is the customer migration between segments?
sql: SELECT previous_segment, current_segment, COUNT(*) as migration_count FROM customer_segment_history WHERE change_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY previous_segment, current_segment ORDER BY migration_count DESC;
creator: Michael Chen

question: What is the ticket volume trend over the last 30 days?
sql: SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, COUNT(*) as ticket_count FROM support_tickets WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date;
creator: Emily Davis

question: Which ticket categories have the most issues?
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) as ticket_count FROM support_tickets GROUP BY category ORDER BY ticket_count DESC LIMIT 10;
creator: David Wilson

question: What is the escalation rate for support tickets?
sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN escalated = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as escalation_rate FROM support_tickets WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days';
creator: Lisa Anderson

question: What is the revenue breakdown by product category?
sql: SELECT category, SUM(revenue) as total_revenue FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE sale_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
creator: Robert Taylor

question: What is the accounts receivable aging?
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN days_past_due < 30 THEN '0-30 days' WHEN days_past_due < 60 THEN '31-60 days' WHEN days_past_due < 90 THEN '61-90 days' ELSE '90+ days' END as age_group, SUM(amount) as total_amount FROM accounts_receivable GROUP BY age_group;
creator: Jennifer Martinez

question: What is the gross profit margin?
sql: SELECT (SUM(revenue) - SUM(cost)) * 100.0 / SUM(revenue) as gross_margin FROM sales WHERE sale_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE);
creator: John Smith

question: What is the supplier delivery performance?
sql: SELECT supplier_id, AVG(delivery_delay) as avg_delay, COUNT(CASE WHEN on_time = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as on_time_rate FROM supplier_deliveries GROUP BY supplier_id ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC;
creator: Sarah Johnson

question: What is the product defect rate by manufacturing line?
sql: SELECT production_line, COUNT(CASE WHEN defective = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as defect_rate FROM quality_checks WHERE check_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY production_line ORDER BY defect_rate DESC;
creator: Michael Chen

question: What is the average sales cycle length?
sql: SELECT AVG(closed_date - created_date) as avg_cycle_days FROM sales_deals WHERE status = 'won' AND closed_date IS NOT NULL;
creator: Emily Davis
